items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag. Quilted leather and the brand's classic interlocking letter motif have become the symbol of the GG Marmont series. This small shoulder bag is crafted in black leather, featuring a fresh fusion of the small double-G element. Black quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone hardware. As a Gucci Tag selected item, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Suede-feel microfiber lining, double-G, inside: one open pocket, strap: 23.5cm (height) zipper closure.

items.name_en: 💖《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💖Aphrodite Small Shoulder Bag. Gucci explores the path of craftsmanship with modern design aesthetics, cleverly blending classic brand elements with beloved brand icons. This small shoulder bag features ample space, crafted from black soft leather, with a striking double-G logo on the closure. Black soft leather, black enamel brass hardware with ceramic finish, microfiber lining, inside: one zip pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (30cm high) with double-G magnetic snap, weight: approx. 0.35kg.
